item.title: Glissant
item.description:
Electronic music composition

I’ve developed a style of composition inspired by the great minimalist composers of the 20th century and my own explorations into synthesis and systems music. I call my style “burbles” and imagine it like water flowing downhill, disturbed by the pebbles and other obstacles it passes.

item.title: Guitar Lessons
item.description:
Classical Guitar Lessons in Anacortes, WA

I offer private classical guitar lessons for students of all levels, from absolute beginners to advanced players working on technique and repertoire.

What we can work on

  • Fundamentals of classical guitar technique
  • Musicality
  • Tone production with or without nails
  • Ergonomics — how to play comfortably and troubleshoot physical issues
  • Music reading
  • Theory, composition, and arrangement
  • How to practice effectively
  • Strategies for learning and maintaining repertoire
  • How to record yourself
  • Music notation using MuseScore or Dorico
  • Nail care

Get in touch

Email me to schedule a lesson or ask any questions.

item.title: Irish Flute
item.description:
I have been playing Irish flute since 2004. I have learned directly from master traditional players and the communities I have lived in, and am proud to have developed a style which honors my influences and affords me the versatility to play well in a wide variety of settings.

Performances

Tom O’Dowd’s Favourite — traditional Irish reel

item.title: Sheet Music
item.description:
All scores are available as PDF downloads via Gumroad for $9.99 each. Each score includes fingerings and performance notes.

Original Compositions

Prelude #1 (2022)

Inspired by the work of Agustín Barrios Mangoré and J.S. Bach.

Rondo

Features smooth left-hand fingering techniques.

Waltz

An elegant piece for early intermediate players.

Dandelion Waltz

A simple piece with a folkloric character.

Etude #1

A challenging etude inspired by the compositions of Francisco Tárrega.
